The document contains information about a candidate's academic background, technical skills, achievements, and publications.

The candidate has completed their Bachelor of Technology in Computer Science and Engineering from Lovely Professional University, with a CGPA of 8.67.

Their technical skills include programming languages such as C++, Python, HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, as well as developer tools like Android Studio, Git, and Visual Studio Code.

The candidate has achieved several notable accomplishments, including:

- Securing an AIR 997 in GATE 2024 (Data Science and Artificial Intelligence) out of 40,000 candidates.
- Winning the Gear Up – Smart India Hackathon 2023 for pioneering a sustainable and energy-efficient public lighting system.

Their publications include:

- "Ultra-Wideband Technology for Healthcare Monitoring: A Machine Learning Approach" in the 2024 International Conference on Cybernation and Computation (CYBERCOM) by IEEE.
- "IoT-Based Smart Farming System using Machine Learning" in the 2024 International Journal for Research in Applied Science and Engineering Technology (iJRASET).

The candidate has also worked on several projects, including a Beacon-Based Indoor Location Tracking System and an IoT-Based Smart Farming System using Machine Learning.
